auc: 0.89327 (aided readers in clinical reader study); 0.9399 (pediatric bench); 0.98607 (adult predicate bench); 0.98781 (adult retrained bench)
intended_use: Rayvolve is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software device to assist radiologists and emergency physicians in detecting fractures during the review of radiographs of the musculoskel
intended_use_full: Rayvolve is a computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software device to assist radiologists and emergency physicians in detecting fractures during the review of radiographs of the musculoskeletal system. Rayvolve is indicated for adult and pediatric population (≥ 2 years).
ground_truth: Panel of three US board-certified musculoskeletal (MSK) radiologists providing binary labeling and localization information for presence or absence of fracture
other_metrics: Reader AUC improved from 0.84602 (unaided) to 0.89327 (aided), difference of 0.04725 (95% CI: 0.03376; 0.061542, p=0.0041); reader sensitivity improved from 0.86561 to 0.9554; reader specificity improved from 0.82645 to 0.83116
